title: Monday.com mobile

posts.author: jackw (Jack Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have been a monday user for 3 years now. I have watched the platform develop tremendously. Things have really improved, however I have watched the mobile app develop very little.

The monday.com team constantly adds to the desktop platform and is always improving however when it comes to the mobile it is constantly crashing, slow and not functioning as it should. It would be great to see the monday team invest some time into making a proper app.
